
Set Theory (finite sets python?)
Types
Resolution
Knuth Bendix
Term Rewriting
Metatheory?
Metamath?
LCF? Proofs
Logic Programming, kanren, 
SAT
SMT
Tableau
Intro to Logic

Search
Symmetry

Programming Language Semantics

Temporal Logic
Intuitionistic and Modal and Linear Logics?

Harrison book?
Traat
avigad book

Enderton book? Fitting? 



20 mins a day?

Get it serving
donate button?
I could stream writing it
